summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BuddyBot authentication system (Iteration 3). All new parent authentication features, JWT token handling, password gate functionality, Google OAuth integration, and protected/public endpoint access working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API health check working
Parent registration creates user + auto child profile with JWT token
Login with valid credentials (parent@test.com/secure123) returns JWT token
Login with invalid credentials correctly returns 401
GET /api/auth/me returns user data + children with valid token, 401 without token
POST /api/auth/verify-password correctly verifies password (200 for correct, 401 for incorrect)
POST /api/auth/logout clears authentication
GET /api/parent/dashboard requires auth token (200 with token, 401 without)
GET /api/parent/alerts requires auth token (200 with token, 401 without)
Public chat endpoints work without authentication (POST /api/chat/send, GET /api/chat/conversations)
Frontend login page loads with email/password form and Google login button
Frontend login with invalid credentials shows error message
Frontend login with valid credentials redirects to password gate
Password gate with incorrect password shows error message
Password gate with correct password unlocks parent dashboard
Parent dashboard shows all tabs (Overview, Alerts, Conversations, Browsing Activity)
Dashboard tab navigation working (Overview, Alerts, Conversations, Browsing Activity)
Dashboard statistics cards display correctly (7 stat cards found)
Browsing analysis functionality working (Run AI Analysis button)
Navigation between chat and parent dashboard working
Logout functionality redirects to login page
Protected route /parent redirects to login when not authenticated
Password gate shown on direct dashboard access (requires re-verification)
Public chat page accessible without authentication
Public chat message sending works without authentication
Google OAuth button redirects to auth.emergentagent.com correctly
Registration form toggle between login/register modes working
User registration creates new account and redirects to password gate
New user login and dashboard access working
Email alerts system configured (Resend API with placeholder key - emails logged to console)

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All 15 auth-focused API tests passing (registration, login, token validation, protected endpoints, public endpoints)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All auth flows working (login, password gate, dashboard access, logout, registration, Google OAuth redirect)
